query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.consultorId, u.programId, u.isActive, u.loginMethod FROM users u WHERE u.name LIKE '%Joseane%' OR u.name LIKE '%joseane%' OR u.name LIKE '%Carolina%' OR u.name LIKE '%carolina%' ORDER BY u.name;
